articles.title: Lamplighter Brewing Co. workers vote to join union
articles.description:
A press release said the staff at the Cambridge brewery is moving forward with bargaining for their first contract.

The post Lamplighter Brewing Co. workers vote to join union appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lamplighter Brewing Co. workers in Cambridge voted to unionize on March 3, 2026.
Staff will begin negotiations for their first contract following the union vote.
This unionization may improve working conditions and benefits for local brewery employees.

articles.title: Pedestrian hospitalized after being struck by MBTA bus in Norwood
articles.description:
Transit police say the woman was conscious and alert when taken to the hospital and is listed in stable condition.

The post Pedestrian hospitalized after being struck by MBTA bus in Norwood appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MBTA bus struck a pedestrian in Norwood, resulting in hospitalization.
The woman was conscious and alert, now listed in stable condition.
Incident raises concerns about pedestrian safety in Boston transit areas.

articles.title: A Mass. town voted down a new fire station. The old one just got shut down after the blizzard.
articles.description:
Westwood voters repeatedly balked at the $38.1 million price tag for a new fire station. Mother Nature intervened.

The post A Mass. town voted down a new fire station. The old one just got shut down after the blizzard. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Westwood voters rejected a $38.1 million proposal for a new fire station.
The old fire station was shut down following a recent blizzard.
Residents may face delayed emergency response due to the lack of a functioning fire station.

articles.title: He’s running his 130th marathon at the 130th Boston Marathon
articles.description:
Yes, Alberto Colin planned it that way.

The post He’s running his 130th marathon at the 130th Boston Marathon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alberto Colin will run his 130th marathon at the 130th Boston Marathon on April 15, 2026.
Colin's participation highlights the marathon's significance to local runners and the Boston community.
His achievement inspires Boston residents to pursue their own marathon goals and fitness journeys.

articles.title: A new six-story building could rise where a pizza shop and dentist now stand in Jamaica Plain
articles.description:
The proposal calls for 35 apartments atop retail space, replacing the current one-story structure located in Forest Hills.

The post A new six-story building could rise where a pizza shop and dentist now stand in Jamaica Plain appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A six-story building is proposed to replace a pizza shop and dentist in Jamaica Plain.
The development will include 35 apartments and retail space at Forest Hills.
Local residents may see increased housing options and potential business growth in the area.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum to doctor: ‘I ain’t coming back to be no role player’
articles.description:
As Tatum gets closer to a return, he says being a role player is not on his mind.

The post Jayson Tatum to doctor: ‘I ain’t coming back to be no role player’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum emphasizes he won't return as a role player for the Celtics.
Tatum is nearing a return, aiming to reclaim his star status.
His determination impacts Celtics' playoff strategy and fan expectations.
